form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 55-day let-up. First-up after a year ran last of 10 at Lingfield All Weather on February 12 over 1600m, 14 len behind Borgi with 57.5kg at $41. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Lingfield All Weather on February 16 2025 over 1400m, 4 len behind Winnebago carrying 61kg at $2.50. No easier this time and looks tested again.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Not raced for 42 days. First-up raced behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 10 at this track on February 11 over 2200m, 21 len behind Caramay with 57.5kg at $126. Second run from a spell 8th of 12 at this track on February 25 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind I Am Me with 56.5kg at $101. Will need to go to a new level to compete in this line-up.
